#Baku Arrival/Departure (Version 0.0)
#If there are any issues please contact me.

[airspace]

radius = 40
elevation = 3
floor = 2000
ceiling = 40000
above = 36000
speedrestriction = 15, 250, 10000, 250

name = Baku Heyder Aliyev
